business.name: Bell Fence Jackson
business.tagline: Jackson's fence and access control experts

hero.headline: Jackson's go-to for *fence and access control*
hero.subheadline: From backyard privacy to commercial security — we stock it, we know it, we install it right.

services_section.label: WHAT WE DO
services_section.heading: Complete Fence Solutions
services_section.subheading: From materials to installation, we handle every part of your project

services.title: Residential Fencing
services.description: Privacy, security, and property line fencing for Jackson homeowners. Wood, vinyl, chain link, and ornamental options.

services.title: Commercial Fencing
services.description: Security perimeters, access control, and industrial fencing solutions for businesses and facilities.

services.title: Access Control Systems
services.description: Gates, keypads, card readers, and automated entry systems. We know what works best for your location.

services.title: Fence Materials & Supplies
services.description: Complete inventory of fencing materials, posts, hardware, and accessories. Easy in-and-out pickup.

about.heading: The Jackson Fence Team
about.body: We're the Jackson fence company that contractors and homeowners both trust. James, Hans, and the whole crew know materials, installations, and access control inside and out.

reviews.name: William C.
reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and great service. 10/10 recommend for any material needs.

reviews.name: Deagan S.
reviews.text: Always quick to help and knowledgeable. James and Hans specifically go above and beyond. Highly recommend for fencing materials.

reviews.name: Gerald K.
reviews.text: Bell Fence has it all. Local, decent pricing, knowledgeable guys. When I need fencing, I'll definitely go back.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Jackson & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Local fence installation and materials throughout the metro area

cta.heading: Ready for Your Fence Project?
cta.body: Get honest pricing and expert advice from Jackson's fence professionals. Materials in stock, installation crews ready.
